name: Cherry Cake (Beer Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Beat eggs until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Gradually beat in sugar. Add vanilla.
4. Fold sifted flour, baking powder, and salt into the egg mixture.
5. Heat beer in a saucepan.
6. Add beer and melted butter all at once to the batter.
7. Pour batter into a greased cherry-lined tube or molded pan.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 375 degrees.
9. Turn cake out onto a cake rack to cool.
10. Prick top of cake and drizzle with 4 tablespoons warm beer.
